calibration_corpus_admission_records.source_label: Voyager 1 GBT X-band calibration reference (already ingested)
calibration_corpus_admission_records.notes: Voyager 1 X-band carrier (guppi_57650_67573_Voyager1_0002.0000.h5). Admitted as Tier 1 reference cadence. X-band only — not an L-band noise sample; used as pipeline calibration reference. Provenance approved in DECISION-122. real_data_authorized=false because authorization is tracked in observation_artifact provenance, not this record.
